edible_parts: Fruit (edible, bland); grown mainly as an ornamental.
other_uses: Show-stopping Pacific currant draped in deep-pink to red flower clusters in early spring.
prep: The blue-black berries are edible but rather bland/insipid (better for birds or mixed into other fruit); grown chiefly as one of the finest native flowering shrubs and an early hummingbird plant.
risks: Ribes can host white pine blister rust.
buy: Native-plant nurseries and native seed suppliers.
